measures.Margin %: Margin / Net Sales (NULL if Net Sales = 0)

dimensions.ProductName: Individual product name (high-cardinality — always filter by Brand or Category first)
dimensions.Country: Country where the sale occurred (store country)

sample_queries.description: Top 10 brands by Margin in Q1 2024
Top products in the Computers category by Net Sales in 2023
Net Sales by Country and Year for 2022–2024

anti_patterns: Do NOT query ProductName without a Brand or Category filter — this produces thousands of rows.
date_range is required for all measures. Omitting it raises an error.
date_range.from must be <= date_range.to; both must be valid ISO dates (YYYY-MM-DD).
date_range.from must not be a future date — the dataset contains historical sales only.
Maximum 100 rows are returned per query. Use filters or a smaller date range to narrow results.
Use get_dimension_values() to discover valid filter values before filtering.
